verses.2: For they shall soon be cut down like the grass,
verses.3: Trust in the LORD, and do good.
verses.4: Also delight yourself in the LORD,
verses.5: Commit your way to the LORD.
verses.6: he will make your righteousness shine out like light,
verses.7: Rest in the LORD, and wait patiently for him.
verses.8: Cease from anger, and forsake wrath.
verses.9: For evildoers shall be cut off,
verses.10: For yet a little while, and the wicked will be no more.
verses.11: But the humble shall inherit the land,
verses.12: The wicked plots against the just,
verses.13: The Lord will laugh at him,
verses.14: The wicked have drawn out the sword, and have bent their bow,
verses.15: Their sword shall enter into their own heart.
verses.16: Better is a little that the righteous has,
verses.17: For the arms of the wicked shall be broken,
verses.18: The LORD knows the days of the perfect.
verses.19: They shall not be disappointed in the time of evil.
verses.21: The wicked borrow, and don’t pay back,
verses.22: For such as are blessed by him shall inherit the land.
verses.23: A man’s steps are established by the LORD.
verses.24: Though he stumble, he shall not fall,
verses.25: I have been young, and now am old,
verses.26: All day long he deals graciously, and lends.
verses.27: Depart from evil, and do good.
verses.29: The righteous shall inherit the land,
verses.30: The mouth of the righteous talks of wisdom.
verses.31: The law of his God is in his heart.
verses.33: The LORD will not leave him in his hand,
verses.34: Wait for the LORD, and keep his way,
verses.35: I have seen the wicked in great power,
verses.36: But he passed away, and behold, he was not.
verses.37: Mark the perfect man, and see the upright,
verses.38: As for transgressors, they shall be destroyed together.
verses.39: But the salvation of the righteous is from the LORD.
verses.40: The LORD helps them and rescues them.
